findings.evidence: `SemigroupGroupPullback.lean:78` has `theorem comp_spatial {Φ : Type*} [FunLike Φ W V] [AddHomClass Φ W V]`, but `:92` restricts the composition form to `(φ : W →+ V) (ψ : U →+ W)`.
findings.fix: State the composition lemma first for `{Φ Ψ} [FunLike Φ W V] [AddHomClass Φ W V] [FunLike Ψ U W] [AddHomClass Ψ U W]`, and derive this `AddMonoidHom` spelling only if needed.
findings.issue: `comp_spatialAddMonoidHom_comp` is only stated for `φ : W →+ V` and `ψ : U →+ W`, although the underlying pullback theorem is already homomorphism-class polymorphic.

findings.evidence: `SemigroupGroupPullback.lean:78-80` proves PD pullback for any `[FunLike Φ W V] [AddHomClass Φ W V]`, and `:134-136` proves continuity for any continuous `φ : W → V`, but `:140-144` requires `(φ : W →+ V)`.
findings.fix: Add or replace it with a generic `comp_spatial_and_continuous {Φ} [FunLike Φ W V] [AddHomClass Φ W V] ... (φ : Φ) (hφ : Continuous φ)`, deriving the additive and continuous-linear-map wrappers from that.
findings.issue: `comp_spatialAddMonoidHom_and_continuous` unnecessarily packages only the `AddMonoidHom` case; its two components are already general in a homomorphism class and in an arbitrary continuous function.

summary: The main pullback/descent API is now at the right homomorphism-class level, but two public packaged/convenience lemmas fall back to concrete `AddMonoidHom` despite composing already-general results.
